title: Section 31
content: The 1[Chairman and other Members] and the officers and other employees provided under section 13 to a Tribunal shall be deemed to be public servants within the meaning of section 21 of the Indian Penal Code (45 of 1860).
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 1 of 2007, s. 13, for "Chairman, Vive-Chairman and other Members" (w.e.f. 19-2-2007).
